3478.name: Below The Zoo
3478.description: This dark pit is the holding place for Annabelle when she needs to be transported from her cage for medical tests or pedicures. Scorch marks streak the rough cut stone walls where chains hang to secure Annabelle, or any other animal, should they get a bit feisty. Heavy steel doors stand west and northwest and you hear a faint drilling sound coming from behind each. However intriguing the sounds might be, the doors look unquestionably impenetrable.

npcs.name: Troll guard
npcs.description: work at the Zoo at Barcas.

3456.name: Fountain-Lined Path
3456.description: Tall copper pipes, each topped with a large ornately painted porcelain koi, line the path here spraying a fine mist onto visitors below. The water runs off to the side of the pathway, collecting in a small canal that runs to the east.

3457.name: Along The Zoo Path
3457.description: Noble gray herons walk freely here, wading in the shallow canals that line the walkway. The zoo path, as well as the small trickling canal, continues to the north. To the south you see a small garden.

3458.name: Koi Pond
3458.description: Small canals from the south terminate here, feeding into a large koi pond with freshly aerated water. Patrons dangling their hands over the pond offer willing koi a snack while the herons nearby wait for someone to turn their back for just a second. The wall behind the pond to the north is covered in tall, overgrown reeds that act as a perch for various songbirds that flit around the zoo.

3459.name: Along The Zoo Path
3459.description: You come upon a statue of Frankie, a gentlemanly Barcian god of the sea. He sits here atop a granite slab poised majestically on his powerful fishlike tail. Made of solid marble, he looks east, and as you follow his gaze, you sense a faint trace of salt in the air.

3460.name: Along The Zoo Path
3460.description: Zoo workers bustle past you, and if their smell is any indication, they've just finished cleaning fish. To the south you hear squeals of delight -- perhaps someone has just won something.

3462.name: North End of the Midway
3462.description: The walkway turns to polished stone to the north and from here south stretches a dusty dirt path. In the distance you hear shouts of both joy and frustration mixed with the noise from crude wooden mechanics spinning, grinding and hammering against what sound like wooden boards.

3463.name: Along The Zoo Path
3463.description: The smell of fish is faint here, thank goodness. The pathway through the zoo extends to the west and to the east you see a plaque reading "Zoo Staff Only. Please Keep Out. " You're practically ready to head west, because nothing interesting could be in the staff area, anyway.

3464.name: Staff Only
3464.description: You feel like such a rebel! The thrill of being somewhere you aren't supposed to be consumes you and you begin to feel slightly giddy. Who knows, next the staff may just find you skinny dipping in the zoo pond. You decide against it, sticking to this quick sneak for everyone's sake. To the east lies a boring storage room while the staff-area path continues south.

3465.name: Inside The Store Room
3465.description: You enter a dusty, dimly lit store room lined with shelves and filled with boxes. Barrels are strewn about the floor as if someone was in a hurry to get the animals fed so they could finish their shift.

3466.name: Staff Only
3466.description: What was finely cut stone in other parts of the zoo, the path here seems to be made of roughly placed rocks leftover from a defunct quarry. The stones are uneven here, making you pay closer attention to your steps.

3467.name: Outside The Zookeeper's Quarters
3467.description: You stand outside a modest lodge with no windows and a fragile door almost hanging on its frame. Before the door sits a welcome mat reading "Wipe Your Paws. " Certainly this was a present from the Zookeeper's grandmother.

3469.name: In The Closet
3469.description: This tiny hole in the wall hardly qualifies as a closet, but nontheless the Zookeeper has made the best of this sad situation. Extra shirts hang here along with a few pairs of clean pants and a fuzzy bath robe.

3470.name: Staff Only
3470.description: A few thorny bushes grow here, hardly as well tended as the others in the zoo. In fact, these look as if they haven't been pruned in ages. The staff- only path ends here and the only way you see is to return to the north.

3471.name: Picnic Spot
3471.description: The lapis blue path stops here, giving way to lush grass that gives a soft crunch underfoot. Stone tables and benches are scattered here, along with a small area set aside for children to play. Bushes line up in front of a wooden fence that separates the park from the staff quarters.

3472.name: Along The Blue Path
3472.description: You're distracted from your view of the path by a monstrous tank that lies just to the west. Nearly the size of a house, the tank holds the mythical Underwater Panther. At least you think this is the right tank. Your memory of the zoo map is fuzzy; you only glanced at it upon entering the park. To the east you notice a nice spot for a picnic.

3473.name: Along The Blue Path
3473.description: You head along this elaborate inlaid path and take in the fishy air, wondering what lies ahead. To the south you can make out two more attractions, the hairs on your arms standing on end in anticipation.

3474.name: Along The Blue Path
3474.description: The mosaic underfoot now depicts a great battle between the legendary Underwater Panther and the Barcian epic hero, Rox. From the mosaic you learn that these two beasts are highly incompatible despite their having nearly identical habitats. The scene shows Rox slashing at the Panther's throat, spilling most of her blood. Though Rox's victory is immortalized in this scene, you think it wise that the two are kept in separate tanks so no future battles are necessary. A beautiful tank sits before you.

3475.name: Before Annabelle's Cage
3475.description: Black granite steps lead up to the cage door of the zoo's main attraction. Through the bars, you manage to see boulders and various pieces of shrubbery purposefully placed inside. The cage is three times as large as any in the zoo and, when visible to zoo patrons, you're sure that Annabelle is indeed quite a sight. You have lost 1064 experience.

npcs.name: Zookeeper
npcs.description: a dark alley.  Scars cover his arms and legs, and the the fact that he's missing an index finger doesn't really surprise you.

3477.name: Inside Annabelle's Cage
3477.description: You stand in the doorway of Annabelle's cage and you're overwhelmed by the smell of old blood. As you venture inside, bones snap underfoot with each step Annabelle likely naps, while a soft lichen groundcover acts as flooring. Shrubs in various stages of decay have been ripped from the grounds surrounding her cage and scattered about the floor.

npcs.name: Annabelle
npcs.description: stunning example of a draj you've ever seen.  Her painted pink toenails do not diminish your respect for her power and ferocity one iota.

3482.name: Along The Blue Path
3482.description: A statue of three bards stands here, one a woman, each with primitive instruments in hand. At the base is a granite slab hastilly carved with crude shapes resembling flames. The singers, mouths agape as if captured in a moment of song, must have fallen from favor long ago. Most zoo patrons pass by without a further look.

3483.name: Splash Point
3483.description: Water has been splashed onto the path here, presumably by the Merrow who lives in this great big tank. He's a playful critter and often likes to entertain the visitors by soaking them with a wave of water from the flick of his tail. Little do the visitors know that he'd surely eat them and their young if they got within his reach.

3484.name: Along The Blue Path
3484.description: The lapis walkway here is inlaid with other fine, highly polished stones to create a mosaic of fish and other sea-dwelling creatures. You boggle at fact that you're walking atop stones that, if sold, could pay your bills for a year.

3485.name: Path Through The Zoo
3485.description: The smell of fish definitely enters the air here, coming directly from the south. A few empty buckets lie nearby, the only clue to their former contents being streaks of blood along the side and a lone fishy eyeball. The pathway changes from stone to a brightly polished cobalt blue walkway. Could that really be lapis you're walking on?

3486.name: Toss The Wumpus
3486.description: Mandavilla vines have overtaken the roof of this hut, creating an awning where streams of light shine down on three urns along the back wall. Each has the face of the mythical Wumpus, known for bringing good fortune to any Barcian if spotted, painted on the front.

3487.name: Along The Midway
3487.description: You spot occasional pieces of litter along the side of the path and you note this wouldn't happen in any other part of the zoo. It seems the zoo workers don't frequent this corridor like they do the others. You wonder if it has anything to do with the carnies' smell.

3489.name: Along The Midway
3489.description: In stark contrast to the grandeur of the Zoo at Barcas is its Midway. While other areas of the zoo instill a sense of awe and appreciation for its opulence, this area is homey with gravel paths and quaint game huts.

3490.name: A Shell Game
3490.description: Light streams in from the gaps between the palm fronds that make up the roof of this bamboo hut. A small round table sits in the middle of the room, crudely assembled from mismatched pieces of wood. On it, a row of shells catches your eye. In front of you sits a small brass bell.

npcs.name: Dwarf
npcs.description: These dwarves are clearly not pleased by your intteruption of the ritual. You will be done away with shortly.

npcs.name: Zoo guard
npcs.description: What else is there to say?

3491.name: South End Of The Midway
3491.description: The stone pathway to the south turns to a fine gravel floor here marking the south end of the zoo's Midway. You hear jeers and cheers to the north and could swear you heard a, "Step right up!"

3492.name: At The Gift Shop
3492.description: Shelves filled with stuffed toys in the shape of zoo favorites line the back wall while metal racks are covered with magnets and other tchotchkes. You rifle through a nearby pile and discover a T-shirt with the likeness of Annabelle printed on it. You ponder buying it for 50 obsidian, but think better of it.

npcs.name: Giftshop worker
npcs.description: that reads "Sybil."  Her green eyes and short red hair prove a pleasant sight and you're happy to have her watch you shop.

3493.name: A Path Through The Zoo
3493.description: You walk the path of the most southern part of the zoo. To the east you make out a small shop -- maybe you can get a souvenir there. To the west it gets awfully dark. But the Zookeeper knows what he's doing, surely it's kept dark for a reason.

3494.name: A Path Through The Zoo
3494.description: You're uneasy walking through the dark, as you can't make out what lies in any direction around you. To the east you notice a faint glow -- maybe it's not dark there. To the west you see nothing but blackness.

3495.name: West Of The Midway
3495.description: The stone path begins here, a nice departure from the dusty gravel to the east. To the west you can just make out what might be a pond and to the east you can return to the Midway for more fun and prizes.

3496.name: West Of The Midway
3496.description: This quiet path is a nice change of pace from the heckling carnies to the east. Here, you can plan your next adventure in the zoo, enjoy a snack, or simply relax and enjoy the cool breeze while listening to the very faint trickle of water or the chirping of songbirds overhead.

3497.name: West Of The Midway
3497.description: You hear the trickle of water in the distance and notice the absence of crowds in this area. Perhaps the main attractions are somewhere else? The stone walkway leads east toward the Midway.

w.to_room_name: Pond At The Center Of The Zoo

3498.name: Pond At The Center Of The Zoo
3498.description: Small fountains work to aerate the water to keep the various flounder and carp happy. Lily pads dot the pond, which turtles use to sun themselves in the afternoon. You wonder what else is swimming around in there.

3499.name: The Path Through The Zoo
3499.description: In the daylight you wouldn't think twice about the flight of birds above you, but here you wonder if there's something more sinister lurking. To the south you see a cage, but hesitate to look more closely. The chattering from other zoo visitors isn't noticeable here, making you wonder where the rest of the visitors are.

3500.name: In With The Uni
3500.description: The height of this cage must reach twenty feet and be three times that in width. Small rocks are strewn about the ground, as if they'd been thrown in from the outside. Some of the cage's bars are bent, warped by years of being beaten upon by something on the inside. You sense this is home to one of the Zoo's most tormented creatures.

npcs.name: Uni
npcs.description: two horns protruding from his temples and long claws stretching far

3501.name: Path Through The Zoo
3501.description: In the middle of this dark pathway, you hear the cry of a hawk overhead and can't help but wonder if it's somehow sizing you up. A rustle in a nearby bush startles you and you convince yourself a zoo worker is just watering the plants. As you strain to see, you can just make out the outline of a cage to the north.

3502.name: The Amarok's Cage
3502.description: It's an unassuming cage, but certainly sturdy looking. It's dark here, so you can't quite make out if the amarok is indeed home or if he's been taken out for breeding. The cage is long, yet narrow, allowing the wolf-like creature room to run. Boulders are seen toward the far end where the amarok likes to sleep.

npcs.name: Amarok
npcs.description: this nighttime hunter looks as if he could tackle you in one leap.

3503.name: Dark Path Through A Zoo
3503.description: You step cautiously through this dark zone wondering what cages await you. You can hear noises to the east and west, but aren't sure if they're coming from nearby cages, or if the darkness has you hearing things.

3504.name: Between Two Cages
3504.description: You wonder how here, where it is completely dark, patrons are able to view any of the animals on display. The breeze doesn't seem so refreshing anymore; now it brings with it a wave of uncertainty and uneasiness. You notice cages to the north and south, but are unable to make out what may live inside.

s.to_room_name: The Cage That Holds Rolling Alice

3505.name: The Tarasque's Cage
3505.description: A rocky floor rests beneath your feet and, through the darkness, you can make out an oddly bare cage. Fuzzy moss covers the ground, except for the distinct path worn by, what you assume, is the constant and consistent pacing of a very heavy animal.

npcs.name: Tarasque
npcs.description: ox.  You don't know what to make of those spines along his back or his spikey tail either.  No wonder he's on display; he's funny lookin'.

3506.name: The Cage That Holds Rolling Alice
3506.description: The Rolling Alice quite fancies munching on fabric and the blankets filled with holes that cover the floor prove it. The only other items in her cage are discarded boxes from the Zoo's concession stand, which she nests in to hide herself from view. A quite strange creature, indeed.

npcs.name: Rolling Alice
npcs.description: and not afraid to fight when cornered.

3507.name: Path Through The Zoo
3507.description: As you walk along the beginning of this, the most southern path through the zoo, you notice the amount of vegetation begins to wane. Jagged, roughly cut rocks replace lush vines and you squint as the sunlight is greatly diminished here.

3508.name: Shady Corner
3508.description: Wooden benches formed into simple yet appealing curved shapes offer a place for patrons to rest their feet in the shade. A multitude of planters display vegetation every bit as diverse as the animals on display. The excited cries of children are sometimes heard over the low chatter of zoogoers as they wander about the attractions. A set of trash bins flanks the walkway here. The Barcians seem to be into cleanliness.

3509.name: Exploring The Zoo
3509.description: The stone pathway stretches out here, wide enough for large crowds to make their way into the park. Rubbish bins are fashioned out of iron scrollwork, their ornate curves intertwined to resemble the climbing vines you see all around you.

3510.name: Concession Stand
3510.description: Boy, would you kill for some Barcian candy or a popsicle in the shape of Annabelle right about now. The area near the concession stand window is surrounded by artificial models of the delicacies available for purchase. This display makes it so visitors who may speak a different language can simply point and grunt and still receive their treats.

2942.name: Zoo Entrance
2942.description: You stand before a tall marble archway which, at its top holds bronze letters that read "Welcome to the Zoo at Barcas. " Judging from their size, the marble stones must have cost a fortune to import.

2943.name: The Welcome Center
2943.description: With polished marble floors and walls, this room is completely out of character for a zoo. However, this is Barcas, and everything is over the top. A small notice board boasts announcements of the zoo's latest acquisitions. You can hardly wait to step inside.

npcs.name: Welcoming elf
npcs.description: With long white hair and eyes that strangely match her lavender tunic, the welcoming elf is visibly excited that you are here.

3443.name: Inside The Zoo
3443.description: You stand just inside the zoo, admiring the lush foliage and wild songbirds that flit overhead. The pathway leads through the park and to the south a concession stand awaits those who might need a snack. A rough map of the zoo is displayed to help orient new visitors.

3444.name: Exploring The Zoo
3444.description: The pathway widens and is flanked by deep green pothos vines growing amid myriad tropical blooms of orange and red. Brightly colored songbirds give chase, zooming in and out of the crowds and the occasional bee buzzes by your ear.

3445.name: At The Fig Tree
3445.description: An intricate iron bench encircles a towering fig tree in this northwest corner of the zoo. Iron rods within the bench were expertly crafted to jasmine vine invites you to rest a moment.

3446.name: Path Through The Zoo
3446.description: This path marks the beginning of the northern wing of the zoo. Most of the creatures here are fairly harmless and usually regarded as cute. In the distance you see a handful of cages, their inhabitants indiscernible.

3447.name: Path Through The Zoo
3447.description: As you take in the chatter of surrounding caged critters, you stop to notice a cage to the north that is set farther back than the rest in this wing of the zoo. How strange.

3448.name: Path Through The Zoo
3448.description: You continue along the stone pathway, enjoying the cool breezes. However, when the winds shift to the northwest, you are gently reminded you're in a zoo filled with animals. And judging from what's in the air, ones that like to eat.

3449.name: The Gwyllion's Cage
3449.description: You stand before a modest cage, with a neatly made bed of straw in the center. Flowering vines hang from the ceiling, sometimes obscuring the view of the woodland sprite.

3450.name: Inside The Cage
3450.description: Now in the doorway of the Gwyllion's cage, it's no easier to make out what's inside than it was before. A thick net of hanging vines obscures your view of the cage, leaving only its movement to indicate if something is sneaking about.

npcs.name: Gwyllion
npcs.description: zoo bothers having her on display at all.  If her looks weren't enough, her shrill screams certainly make you note to skip this cage next time.

3451.name: Between Two Cages
3451.description: A vaulting metal archway overhead connects, as a decoration, the cages to the north and south. Serving nothing more than an aesthetic purpose, the archway is adorned with gleaming golden leaves and expertly enameled pieces of artificial fruit.

3452.name: Inside a Pica's Cage
3452.description: You stand inside a cage littered with shredded newspaper and chewed up pencils. It appears the Pica feasts on pencils, though you grimace when imagining the taste.

npcs.name: Pica
npcs.description: revealing his toothy maw.  His gray beady eyes twinkle when he meets your gaze making you hope he hasn't taken a liking to you.

3453.name: Nice Digs
3453.description: The ground is soft here, almost like walking on a feather bed. Lumps that appear to be pillows line the perimeter of this all too cushy cage, and you can't help but think this gargoyle has got it made.

npcs.name: Louis the gargoyle
npcs.description: As cute as he can be, Louis looks up at you with his big yellow eyes and smiles.  Tufts of grey and white fur sprout from his ears and you notice the same of his toes.

3454.name: Fountain-Lined Path
3454.description: Fountains line the path here, shooting streams of icy water playfully from spout to spout. Parents hand out coins to young Barcians pestering to make a wish, while a few unleashed teens try to throw someone's little brother in head first.

3455.name: Fountain-Lined Path
3455.description: The walkway is flanked with mighty marble fountains that dominate the flowerbeds surrounding their bases. Streams of water soar skyward, misting the tropical frangipani and passion vines below. The roar of the water drowns out any other sound from the zoo.

3476.name: Amid Catfish
3476.description: This octagonal tank is made of leaded glass panes. Though mostly clear glass makes up this tank, the occasional stained glass dots the perimeter. The view is spectacular from your underwater perspective. It's almost as if Rox, the ridiculously large catfish, lives in an undersea kaleidoscope. Colored light refracts around the tank dazzling you almost to the point of distraction.

npcs.name: Rox the catfish
npcs.description: between daring you to play and ignoring your presence.  Her brown coat is highlighted by her furry orange belly.

3480.name: Atop The Ladder
3480.description: From this vantage point you can see across parts of the zoo. Not afraid of heights, are you? Before you hangs the platform on which the Zookeeper places food to be lowered into the panther's tank. It is slimy, smells like rotten meat and looks none too sturdy.

3481.name: Atop The Suspended Platform
3481.description: The wooden platform is worn and rough, showing the wear from the many plunges into the tank below. Suspended from the ropes above, you await your descent into the cold water. Heading back to the ladder is your only way out of this predicament now.
